analysis: The project is a static website focused on black holes with a dark cosmic theme. The existing files contain incomplete HTML, CSS, and JavaScript content. The theme needs to be enhanced with black hole-specific visual elements, animations, and interactive features to create an immersive cosmic experience.

improvements.description: Add CSS animations for black hole visuals including swirling effects, gravitational lensing, and glowing accretion disks. Implement CSS variables for cosmic color palette (deep purples, blues, and blacks) and add animations for smooth transitions and hover effects on interactive elements.

Complete the HTML structure with sections for black hole facts, interactive animated slides showing different types of black holes, and a cosmic background with animated stars. Add proper semantic HTML structure with header, main content areas, and footer sections.

Implement JavaScript functionality for animated slides showing black hole formation, event horizons, and gravitational effects. Add interactive features like clickable elements that reveal information about different black hole types and their properties.
